title: Embeddings
summary: Compute a dense vector for a text snippet. Configurable output_dimensionality lets you trade vector size against retrieval quality.
notes: output_dimensionality typically supports 768 / 1536 / 3072. Smaller is cheaper to store and faster to compare; larger preserves more discrimination.
task_type (RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT, RETRIEVAL_QUERY, SEMANTIC_SIMILARITY, …) is supported on gemini-embedding-001. On gemini-embedding-2, fold the task into the prompt text instead.
Batch by passing a list to contents — one HTTP round-trip, vectors returned in the same order.
